highlights.description: Migrate GitHub organization from agentplexus to plexusone
Update to structured-plan v0.9.0 with plexusone/structured-evaluation v0.3.0

changed.description: Migrate module path from github.com/agentplexus to github.com/plexusone
Update all import paths and documentation URLs for plexusone org

fixed.description: Resolve G703 path traversal warning with input validation in deploy.go
Resolve G115 integer overflow warning using fmt.Sprintf in prd_test.go

documentation.description: Add UTF-8 feature icons to README.md
Update README shields and URLs for plexusone org

dependencies.description: Update github.com/grokify/structured-plan from v0.8.0 to v0.9.0

infrastructure.description: Update CI workflows to use shared workflows

highlights.description: Migrate from structured-requirements to structured-plan v0.6.0 with OKR-based objectives

changed.description: Replace legacy Objectives fields (BusinessObjectives, ProductGoals, SuccessMetrics) with OKR structure
Update AddObjective() to create OKR entries in Objectives.OKRs
Update AddSuccessMetric() to add KeyResults to OKR.KeyResults (top-level)
Update show command to display OKRs and Key Results
Update validation to check Objectives.OKRs instead of legacy fields

added.description: Add OKR, KeyResult, PhaseTarget type aliases for structured-plan types
Add Goals, GoalItem, ResultItem, Framework type aliases for goals support

highlights.description: Add structured-evaluation integration for standardized PRD quality reports

added.description: Add ScoreToEvaluationReport() for converting deterministic scoring to EvaluationReport format
Add GenerateEvaluationTemplate() for LLM judge template generation
Add GenerateEvaluationTemplateWithWeights() for custom category weights
Add StandardCategories() returning 10 PRD evaluation categories
Add CategoryDescriptions() and CategoryOwners() helper functions for LLM prompts
Add GetCategoriesFromDocument() to extract categories including custom sections
Add EvaluationCategory type alias for structured-prd evaluation category

highlights.description: Initial release of agent-team-prd: multi-agent system for PRD creation and review
16 specialized agents for discovery, specification, review, and revision workflows

added.description: prdtool CLI for PRD management: init, validate, score, show, view commands
prdtool-mcp MCP server exposing PRD operations as tools for AI assistants
pkg/prd package wrapping structured-requirements types with helper functions
pkg/scoring package for PRD quality scoring against rubric
pkg/views package for PM and executive view generation

16 agent specifications: problem-discovery, user-research, market-intel, solution-ideation, requirements, ux-journey, tech-feasibility, metrics-success, risk-compliance, prd-lead, review-board, prd-scoring, exec-explainability, issue-extractor, revision-planner, change-validator
Team workflow specification with DAG-based orchestration
Deployment specifications for Claude Code, Kiro, Gemini, ADK, AWS Bedrock, CrewAI, and Kubernetes
prdtool schema command for programmatic JSON Schema access from structured-requirements
prd_schema MCP tool for AI agent schema access

documentation.description: Agent specification markdown files with roles, responsibilities, and output formats
README with project overview and quick start

dependencies.description: github.com/grokify/structured-requirements v0.2.0 for PRD types and schema
github.com/agentplexus/mcpkit v0.3.1 for MCP server runtime
